## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (no TypeScript errors)
- [ ] Problem steps are manually verified against the C# solution
- [ ] C# solution is idiomatic (not a direct translation from another language)
- [ ] Approach notes include C#-specific observations
- [ ] Registered in `src/problems/index.ts` in NeetCode roadmap order
- [ ] Author added to `src/problems/authors.ts` (if new contributor)
